title: olea terniflora
intro: Olea terniflora, also known as the Korean hawthorn or mountain olive, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Olea terniflora include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an anti-aging agent due to its antioxidant properties. Olea terniflora is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
